jobs.purpose: Nightly audit sweep to catch drift between attributions.touchpoint_count / conversion_touchpoint_count and the actual attribution_touchpoints row count. Fires AttributionTouchpointCountReconciled per drift found + increments the count_drift_corrections counter. Should always report 0 findings.
steps: SELECT id, touchpoint_count, conversion_touchpoint_count FROM attributions WHERE deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1000
For each: SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(was_conversion::int) FROM attribution_touchpoints WHERE attribution_id = ?
When mismatch: UPDATE attributions SET touchpoint_count = actual, conversion_touchpoint_count = actual + fire AttributionTouchpointCountReconciled
Emit metric stackra.attribution.count_drift_corrections — should always be 0 in production

jobs.purpose: Nightly sweep. Subjects with no touchpoint in the last 90 days transition anonymous | identified → churned. Fires AttributionChurned per row. Batched daily digest via AttributionChurnDetectedNotification.
steps: SELECT id FROM attributions WHERE lifecycle_state IN ('anonymous', 'identified') AND last_touch_at < now() - interval '90 days' AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 5000
For each: transition to lifecycle_state='churned' + fire AttributionChurned
Batch AttributionChurnDetectedNotification per tenant per day

jobs.purpose: Dispatched by MergeAnonymousAttributionsOnSubjectIdentified hook when AttributionSubjectIdentified fires (Enterprise-only). Finds anonymous profiles with matching signals (session_id / ip_hash / device_hash) within the last 30 days + merges them into the identified profile. Fires AttributionMerged on success.
steps: Load the identified attribution + its associated User.id

SELECT id FROM attributions WHERE tenant_id = ? AND subject_type = 'anonymous_session' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at > now() - interval '30 days' AND (current_session_id = ? OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM attribution_touchpoints t WHERE t.attribution_id = attributions.id AND (t.device_snapshot->>'ip_hash' = ? OR t.device_snapshot->>'user_agent_hash' = ?)))
Cap the result set at max_anonymous_absorbed (default 10) — refuse merge with ATTRIBUTION_MERGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED if exceeded
For each match: replay every attribution_touchpoint (INSERT INTO attribution_touchpoints with the new attribution_id)
If any anonymous first_touch_at < identified.first_touch_at: overwrite identified.first_touch_* fields (per attribution.merge.first_touch_overwrite_policy)
Soft-delete every absorbed anonymous attribution
Fire AttributionMerged with the full audit payload

jobs.purpose: Daily sweep. Hard-delete soft-deleted attribution rows past retention (730d default, 2555d on Enterprise via attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended). Also hard-delete touchpoints past retention. Also completes the reset audit hold — attribution_touchpoints rows past their reset's 90-day hold are hard-deleted, firing AttributionResetConfirmed.
steps: SELECT id FROM attributions WHERE deleted_at < now() - interval '<retention_window>' LIMIT 500 (retention window per-tenant based on attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended)
For each: attempt hard delete; catch FK RESTRICT and record as 'retention_blocked' in metrics
SELECT id FROM attribution_touchpoints WHERE captured_at < now() - interval '<retention_window>' LIMIT 5000
Batch DELETE — 100 rows per statement
For every attribution with an AttributionResetRequested audit row > 90 days old: hard-delete every associated touchpoint + fire AttributionResetConfirmed

jobs.purpose: Hourly pre-aggregation of campaign performance into a rollup cache. Runs per-tenant with attribution_rollup entitlement. Groups touchpoints by (campaign, source, medium) + counts + conversion counts + first-touch counts. Materialises into att:rollup:{tenant_id}:{window} cache keys for the four windows (1h, 24h, 7d, 30d).
steps: For each tenant with attribution_rollup entitlement:
For each window in [1h, 24h, 7d, 30d]:

SELECT campaign, source, medium, COUNT(*) as touchpoints, SUM(was_conversion::int) as conversions, SUM(was_first_touch::int) as first_touches FROM attribution_touchpoints WHERE tenant_id = ? AND captured_at > now() - interval '<window>' GROUP BY campaign, source, medium ORDER BY touchpoints DESC LIMIT 1000
Write result to cache key att:rollup:{tenant_id}:{window} with TTL 3600s
Fire AttributionCampaignRollupComputed

jobs.purpose: Fires 7 days before a tenant's touchpoint retention window would purge a large batch. Sends an AttributionExpiringNotification to the tenant admin so they can request an export or upgrade to the extended-retention entitlement.
steps: For each tenant: count touchpoints where captured_at BETWEEN (now() - retention_window) AND (now() - retention_window + interval '7 days')
If count > threshold (default 100): dispatch AttributionExpiringNotification to the tenant admin
Threshold is configurable per-tenant via settings
